Dashboard mockups · 5 AI-product directions

All five show the same panel set as the live dashboard — Top-3, Today's Leads, Hire Watch, BD Calendar, Prediction Signals, Candidate Watch, Tools, Recent Reports. Different visual languages so you can pick which AI product the platform should feel like.
01 · Gemini

Pale halo polish

The current direction taken to its full conclusion. Pale-blue radial halo hero with the day's brief stated as a single confident headline. Top-3 as elevated cards floating on the halo, clean white panels below, Inter + JetBrains Mono labels, pulse-green live dot.
Open mockup →
02 · Vercel / Geist

Sleek dark, ship-software feel

Pure black background with a subtle gradient hint. Border-only cards, heavy mono use for numbers and source attribution. Mint accent for the Top-3 ribbon, amber + pink for status. The "you ship serious software with this" energy of Vercel and v0.
Open mockup →
03 · Linear / Raycast

Dim glassmorphic, keyboard-first

Near-black bg with soft indigo / pink / cyan gradient halos in the corners. Frosted glassmorphic panels. ⌘K command bar at the top, keyboard-shortcut chips on tools (G P / G K / G R). Power-user energy.
Open mockup →
04 · Anthropic Console

Clean cream-white, editorial

Warm cream-white base, refined Inter typography in multiple weights, big stats summary, the Anthropic clay accent used sparingly. Generous whitespace. The "serious people use this tool" restraint of console.anthropic.com.
Open mockup →
05 · Stripe / Pitch

Vibrant SaaS, accent-coded

Light bg with a coloured summary row (purple / green / orange / blue / pink) — each signal source gets its own tone. Big number cards, gradient buttons, soft shadows. The modern SaaS dashboard you actually want to open.
Open mockup →
